name: Blackened Chicken and Pasta
recipeIngredient: 4 Tablespoons Chef Paul Prudhome's Poultry Magic
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook linguini until al dente. Drain and set aside.
2. Preheat iron frying pan on gas grill at high heat for 20 minutes.
3. Put poultry magic seasoning in a shallow bowl.
4. Put melted butter in a second shallow bowl.
5. Dip chicken first in butter on both sides, then in poultry magic.
6. Place chicken in the preheated frying pan and cook 5-6 minutes on each side.
7. While cooking the chicken, melt remaining 6 tablespoons butter in a Dutch oven.
8. Add half and half and cayenne pepper to the melted butter. Heat over medium heat until the mixture bubbles.
9. Add linguini to the pot. Cover and reduce heat to low.
10. Remove chicken from the frying pan and slice into thin strips.
11. Serve slices of chicken over hot linguini noodles and garnish with tomatoes and green onions.
